name: Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 ripe papaya, seeded, diced into quarters
2 ripe plum tomatoes, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, gently combine the corn kernels, papaya, red onion, tomatoes, garlic, lime zest, and lime juice.
2. Cover and refrigerate for up to 2 hours.
3. Just before serving, stir in the chopped cilantro.
4. Serve chilled. Makes about 4 cups.
per 2 tablespoons: 12 calories, 3g carbohydrates, no protein, no fat, no cholesterol.
